title: The Industrial Revolutions and their Environmental Impact
description: A timeline showing the progression of the four industrial revolutions, their key technological drivers, and the corresponding rise in environmental impact that Green IT now aims to address.
relationships: Leads to increased scale of production ->
Leads to increased energy consumption & resource extraction ->
Leads to proliferation of e-waste & data center energy use ->
Leads to the current need for Green IT principles to mitigate environmental impact
